overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tropical coastal settlement. The character traverses shallow tidal pools, passes through an open-air market with green canvas canopies, and continues along a sandy beach lined with wooden shipwreck ruins under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal settlement approach with shallow tidal pools

events.description: approaching the wooden settlement structures from the tidal flats

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water and sand toward the coastal settlement

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the water's edge in the distance

entered.detail: tall weathered stone pillar with vegetation growing on top
green fabric canopy stretched over wooden market stall
large decaying wooden ship hull beached on the shore
wooden stall with stacked barrels and green canvas roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking through shallow tidal pools toward a coastal settlement. Stone ruins and palm trees dot the background while wooden shipwrecks lie beached on the left. The character approaches market stalls with green canvas awnings on the right, with scattered NPCs visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market with canvas canopies and cooking fires

events.description: entering the covered market area beneath green canvas canopies
character slows slightly to navigate around market stalls and NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area under green canvas canopies, passing by barrels and cooking fires

notable_agents.action: villager standing still reading a tablet or book

entered.detail: metal brazier with glowing embers and cooking pot
thick wooden posts supporting the canopy structure
stack of wooden barrels with metal bands

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters a semi-covered market area with green canvas canopies overhead. The space contains wooden support pillars, stacked barrels, and a cooking fire pit. Several NPCs are present, including one reading a tablet near the entrance. The lighting shifts to dappled sunlight filtering through the fabric as the character navigates between stalls.

events.description: exiting the covered market back into open beach area
character turns right to follow the beach shoreline

agents.ego_description: exiting the market and turning right to walk along the beach shoreline

entered.detail: massive wooden shipwreck hull with broken masts and rigging
sloped wooden ramp leading up to shipwreck deck

segments.scene_description: Aloy exits the market canopy back into bright sunlight, turning right to follow the beach. The scene opens to reveal large wooden shipwreck ruins along the shoreline. The character walks past the remains of beached vessels with broken masts and wooden ramps, while the settlement structures recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with massive shipwreck ruins

events.description: approaching the massive shipwreck hull with wooden stair ramp

agents.ego_description: walking along the beach examining the large shipwreck ruins

entered.detail: distant mountain peak visible above the shipwreck

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Aloy walking along an empty beach with massive shipwreck ruins dominating the left side. The character approaches a large wooden ramp structure leading into the shipwreck hull. The beach stretches into the distance with coastal mountains visible in the background, and the previous settlement structures are no longer in view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Aloy traverses a coastal settlement, moving from shallow tidal pools through a shaded market and finally onto an open beach dominated by shipwrecks. It begins with the character wading through tidal pools past palm trees and stone ruins, approaching a series of market stalls with green canvas awnings. As she enters the market, the bright midday light shifts to dappled sunlight filtering through the overhead canopies, where she navigates past wooden pillars, stacked barrels, and NPCs. The scene then opens back into the brilliant sun as she exits the canopy and turns right, leaving the settlement structures behind to follow the shoreline. Finally, the camera tracks her along an empty beach toward a massive wooden ramp leading into a shipwreck hull, with distant coastal mountains framing the horizon.
